title: A UFO followed a plane for one hour, and it was observed by the crew members [1999]
excerpt: JUNE 15th, 1999. Time: 8:10 pm. Duration: 1h10m. During the flight TAM 825 from SBGO [Santa Genoveva Airport, Goiânia] to SBCG [Campo Grande Airport], seven members of the flight crew observed, for an hour and ten minutes, an unidentified flying object in the form of a very bright light. strong and white, “like 8 Boeing […]
text_preview: JUNE 15th, 1999. Time: 8:10 pm. Duration: 1h10m. During the flight TAM 825 from SBGO [Santa Genoveva Airport, Goiânia] to SBCG [Campo Grande Airport], seven members of the flight crew observed, for an hour and ten minutes, an unidentified flying object in the form of a very bright light. strong and white, “like 8 Boeing headlights”. According to the witnesses who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the sky was “100% clear” and it was possible to see the UFO at the same altitude as flight TAM 825, 35,000ft, following the aircraft at a higher speed in the “2
summary: Seven TAM 825 crew members observed an intense pulsating white light UFO at 35,000ft following their aircraft for over an hour on June 15, 1999.
